threats.title: European Commission Confirms Data Breach Linked to Trivy Supply Chain Attack
threats.summary: Hackers stole over 300GB of data from the Commission’s AWS environment, including personal information. The post European Commission Confirms Data Breach Linked to Trivy Supply Chain Attack appeared first on SecurityWeek.

threats.title: China-Linked TA416 Targets European Governments with PlugX and OAuth-Based Phishing
threats.summary: A China-aligned threat actor has set its sights on European government and diplomatic organizations since mid-2025, following a two-year period of minimal targeting in the region. threats.title: Why Third-Party Risk Is the Biggest Gap in Your Clients' Security Posture
threats.summary: The next major breach hitting your clients probably won't come from inside their walls. It'll come through a vendor they trust, a SaaS tool their finance team signed up for, or a subcontractor nobody in IT knows about.
